video:video.video:title: Midnight Run (1988) Full Movie | Robert De Niro & Charles Grodin | Classic Action Comedy
video:video.video:description: A cynical bounty hunter is hired to track down a former mafia accountant who skipped bail. What should be a simple 'midnight run' turns into a hilarious, cross-country race against the FBI, rival bounty hunters, and the mob. Starring Robert De Niro and Charles Grodin.

video:video.video:title: Dagon (2001) Full Movie | Lovecraftian Horror Film | Classic Cult Horror
video:video.video:description: A boating accident leaves a young man and his girlfriend stranded in a decrepit Spanish fishing village. They soon discover that the eccentric locals worship an ancient, monstrous sea deity and plan to use the outsiders as human sacrifices. Directed by horror master Stuart Gordon.

video:video.video:title: The Phantom of the Opera (2004) Full Movie | Gerard Butler & Emmy Rossum | Musical Drama 4K
video:video.video:description: A disfigured musical genius hidden beneath the Paris Opera House becomes obsessed with a young soprano. As he coaches her to stardom, his fierce love takes a dark turn when her childhood suitor reappears, sparking a grand and tragic battle of passion. Directed by Joel Schumacher.

video:video.video:title: Earthquake (1974) Full Movie | Charlton Heston & Ava Gardner | Classic Disaster Epic
video:video.video:description: Various interconnected citizens struggle to survive after a catastrophic earthquake of unimaginable magnitude rips through Los Angeles, reducing the city to rubble. Starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, and George Kennedy.

video:video.video:title: The Bounty (1984) Full Movie | Mel Gibson & Anthony Hopkins | Classic Historical Adventure
video:video.video:description: A gripping retelling of the famous mutiny on the HMS Bounty. The deep-seated clash of wills between the rigid, duty-bound Captain Bligh and his close friend Fletcher Christian explodes into mutiny amid the paradise of Tahiti. Starring Mel Gibson and Anthony Hopkins.

video:video.video:title: Killer Witches from Outer Space (2024) Full Movie | Sci-Fi Horror Comedy | Alien Creature Feature
video:video.video:description: Halloween is about to be changed forever when a sleepy town is invaded by flesh-eating alien witches and terrifying cosmic creatures. With the local authorities refusing to believe them, three brave teenagers must band together to overthrow the otherworldly beings before the chaos spreads worldwide. Starring Branscombe Richmond.

video:video.video:title: Tough Luck (2003) Full Movie | Norman Reedus & Armand Assante | Crime Thriller
video:video.video:description: A wandering grifter is hired by a mysterious traveling carnival owner to murder his unfaithful wife. As he becomes entangled in a dangerous web of greed, deception, and hidden agendas, he realizes that no one is who they seem. Starring Norman Reedus, Armand Assante, and Dagmara Dominczyk.

video:video.video:title: The Trail (2013) Full Movie | Sharry Flaherty & Rebecca Larsen | Western Drama Adventure
video:video.video:description: After a catastrophic disaster leaves her stranded along the brutal Oregon Trail, a young woman must summon extraordinary inner strength to survive the unforgiving wilderness. As she battles starvation and dangerous elements, she embarks on a profound journey of self-discovery.

video:video.video:title: Gregory's Girl (1980) Full Movie | John Gordon Sinclair & Dee Hepburn | Classic British Coming-of-Age Comedy
video:video.video:description: An awkward Scottish teenager infatuated with the top scorer of the school soccer team tries his best to win her affection, only to discover that the girl he ends up with is not quite the one he expected. A charming, critically acclaimed British classic.

video:video.video:title: Sunset Boulevard (1950) Full Movie | William Holden & Gloria Swanson | Classic Film-Noir Drama
video:video.video:description: A struggling hack screenwriter develops a toxic, dependent relationship with a faded silent-film star who dreams of making a triumphant return to the big screen. Directed by Billy Wilder and starring William Holden and Gloria Swanson.

video:video.video:title: Forever Young (1992) Full Movie | Mel Gibson & Jamie Lee Curtis | Romantic Sci-Fi Drama
video:video.video:description: A devastated 1939 test pilot requests to be cryogenically frozen after his girlfriend falls into a deep coma. Awoken fifty-three years later in 1992 by two young boys, he must navigate a strange new world while searching for his lost love. Starring Mel Gibson and Jamie Lee Curtis.

video:video.video:title: Warlock (1989) Full Movie | Julian Sands & Richard E. Grant | Classic Supernatural Horror Fantasy
video:video.video:description: A malicious warlock escapes execution in 17th-century Boston by traveling through a mystical portal to 1989 Los Angeles. Close on his heels is a determined witch-hunter sworn to stop him from destroying the world. Starring Julian Sands and Richard E. Grant.

video:video.video:title: Vampire's Kiss (1988) Full Movie | Nicolas Cage & Maria Conchita Alonso | Cult Classic Horror Comedy
video:video.video:description: An arrogant literary agent descends into escalating madness and erratic behavior after spending a night with a mysterious woman, convincing himself that he is slowly turning into a vampire. Featuring an unforgettable, iconic performance by Nicolas Cage.

video:video.video:title: Lord of Illusions (1995) Full Movie | Scott Bakula & Famke Janssen | Clive Barker Supernatural Noir Horror
video:video.video:description: During a routine case in Los Angeles, a private investigator stumbles into a terrifying world of dark magic and murder linked to a charismatic illusionist and a dangerous cult awaiting the resurrection of their dead leader. Written and directed by Clive Barker, starring Scott Bakula and Famke Janssen.

video:video.video:title: Stagecoach (1986) Full Movie | Johnny Cash, Willie Nelson & Waylon Jennings | Classic Western Remake
video:video.video:description: A diverse group of passengers traveling aboard a stagecoach through dangerous Apache territory must set aside their personal differences to survive the perilous journey. A star-studded Western remake featuring country music legends Johnny Cash, Willie Nelson, Waylon Jennings, and Kris Kristofferson.

video:video.video:title: Gunfighter's Moon (1995) Full Movie | Lance Henriksen & Kay Lenz | Classic Action Western
video:video.video:description: An aging, notorious gunslinger answers the call of his one true love to save her new husband and town from a ruthless gang of outlaws, forcing him to face his violent past and destiny. Starring Lance Henriksen and Kay Lenz.

video:video.video:title: The Outing (1987) Full Movie | Deborah Winters & James Huston | Classic 80s Supernatural Slasher Horror
video:video.video:description: An ancient, murderous genie is unleashed from an ornate oil lamp and traps a group of unsuspecting teenagers inside a locked museum overnight, turning the exhibits into a playground of supernatural terror. A classic 80s horror favorite, also known as The Lamp.

video:video.video:title: Witchboard (1986) Full Movie | Todd Allen & Tawny Kitaen | Classic 80s Supernatural Ouija Horror
video:video.video:description: A beautiful young woman becomes dangerously obsessed with a Ouija board brought to a party, inadvertently opening a gateway for a malicious, terrorizing spirit bent on total possession. A definitive 80s supernatural horror classic starring Tawny Kitaen and Todd Allen.

video:video.video:title: The Haunted (1991) Full Movie | Sally Kirkland & Jeffrey DeMunn | True Story Supernatural Horror
video:video.video:description: Based on the terrifying true account of the Smurl family, a hardworking family moves into their new Pennsylvania duplex only to be violently plagued by a demonic presence. Desperate for help, they turn to paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. Starring Sally Kirkland and Jeffrey DeMunn.

video:video.video:title: Frank & Jesse (1994) Full Movie | Rob Lowe & Bill Paxton | Classic Action Western
video:video.video:description: Following the devastation of the American Civil War, brothers Frank and Jesse James return home to Missouri only to find themselves targeted by greedy railroad syndicates, driving them to form the infamous James-Younger outlaw gang. Starring Rob Lowe and Bill Paxton.

video:video.video:title: The Forest (1982) Full Movie | Dean Russell & Gary Kent | Classic 80s Slasher Horror
video:video.video:description: Two couples venture into a remote, heavily wooded forest for a weekend camping trip, only to become the targets of a cannibalistic killer living in the wild. Things take a supernatural turn when the ghosts of the killer's past victims try to warn the campers. Starring Dean Russell and Gary Kent.

video:video.video:title: The Fog (2005) Full Movie | Tom Welling & Maggie Grace | Supernatural Horror Remake
video:video.video:description: An island community off the coast of Oregon is besieged by a mysterious, glowing fog that carries the vengeful spirits of mariners murdered by the town's founding fathers 134 years ago. Starring Tom Welling, Maggie Grace, and Selma Blair.
